title: DirtyAliasing
description: Simple Anti-Aliasing (FXAA/TAA) and CAS Upscaling solution for smoother gameplay.
body:
# DirtyAliasing

DirtyAliasing is a post-processing mod for **Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)** that introduces FXAA, TAA, and CAS algorithms to the game renderer.

## Features

**FXAA (Fast Approximate Anti-Aliasing)**
A lightweight algorithm that smooths jagged edges with negligible performance cost.

**TAA (Temporal Anti-Aliasing)**
High-quality smoothing that uses data from previous frames to stabilize the image. It uses neighborhood clamping to reduce ghosting artifacts.

**Dirty Upscale (Experimental)**
This mode uses the AMD FidelityFX CAS algorithm. **Note:** Currently, this feature does not work correctly as a standalone upscaler. It acts as a sharpening filter and does not change the internal render resolution. Use with caution.

## Requirements

*   Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)
*   **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** is required.
